scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @xtrape/capsule-shared build && pnpm --filter @xtrape/capsule-db build && pnpm --filter @xtrape/capsule-test-utils build
scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter opstage-backend build && pnpm --filter @xtrape/opstage-ui build && pnpm --filter demo-capsule-service build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter opstage-backend typecheck && pnpm --filter @xtrape/opstage-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter demo-capsule-service typecheck
